description:
🕒 09:30–14:40

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/tanetsuki-1-2/

⚠️ The tour originally scheduled for June 21 (Sunday) has been rescheduled to June 28 (Sunday) due to organizer circumstances.

Learn to build garden rows in a "mushroom farm" (菌ちゃん畑) that uses fallen leaves and branches. Plant summer vegetables using the mushroom farming method, with advisors sharing easy-to-understand tips on seedling planting and care techniques. Lunch will be at restaurant "La Nora," featuring Italian cuisine made with mushroom-farm vegetables.

【Fee】
Adults: ¥8,800
Middle school students and younger: ¥2,200
(Includes guide, lunch, materials, and insurance)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Hanno Tanetotchi Farm staff

【What to bring】Drinks, hat, towel, gloves, etc.
location: 集合 ラ・ノーラ前の畑 （飯能市下加治243-25、イーグルバス「飯能靖和病院」下車徒歩8分）
summary: Experience mushroom farming and summer vegetable planting in Hanno's forest town
